svg.text: 5 signals + GND. XMOS JTAG is 3.3 V — wire straight through, no level shifter.
GPIO53 = TRST (unused). C6_* = WiFi co-proc, skip.
Odd pins left col, even right. GND = any of 4/8/12/16/20.
TDSRC = TDI (host→target), TDSNK = TDO (target→host). xSYS has no TRST — leave the ESP32 TRST pin unconnected.
